title: Black Steel Padlock with 2 Keys (4 cm) Pack of 1 - Heavy Duty, Waterproof, Perfect for Sheds, Gates, Lockers & More
features: VERSATILE PROTECTION: From valuable tools to bikes and more, our padlock offers comprehensive protection for all your belongings, ensuring they stay secure wherever you go. Trust our sturdy construction to keep your valuables safe and sound.
QUALITY MATERIALS: Made with a combination of steel, brass alloy, and PVC, our padlock is not only durable but also provides smooth operation and a long-lasting security solution.
CONVENIENT OPERATION: With its easy-to-use design, our padlock can be quickly locked and unlocked with just a turn of the key, providing effortless protection for your valuables.

UNIVERSAL APPLICATION: Measuring 4cm in width with a 0.8cm shackle, this versatile padlock is the ideal solution for securing sheds, gates, lockers, and more, offering widespread use across various settings.

ENHANCED SECURITY: Each padlock comes with two keys, providing backup convenience and adding an extra layer of security for your peace of mind. Keep one key handy and store the other in a safe place for added security.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality waterproof padlock is constructed of heavy duty steel and brass and is complete with two keys for added security. Safety Warning No warning applicable
